creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
We have a new maliing list; I've included a doc patch to include
	information about it in the Handbook.

Fix: (As usual, this is my current best guesstimate: I don't
	pretend to be all that familiar with the markup used in the
	docs.  Please feel free to use as much editorial discretion
	as you see fit.)
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
